query: SELECT s.*, c.name as categoryName FROM subcategories s LEFT JOIN categories c ON s.categoryId = c.id WHERE s.name LIKE '%mochi%' OR s.name LIKE '%Mochi%' OR s.name LIKE '%grill%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT s.*, c.name as categoryName FROM subcategories s LEFT JOIN categories c ON s.categoryId = c.id WHERE s.name LIKE '%mochi%' OR s.name LIKE '%Mochi%' OR s.name LIKE '%grill%';

rows.name: Grilled Mochi
rows.description: Soft, chewy rice cake lightly grilled to a golden crisp on the outside and tender inside. Gently smoky, and satisfying, it’s a comforting treat that’s delicious paired with either sweet or savoury sauces and toppings.
